revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with '{{draft}} {{Interlanguage link|{{PAGENAME}}|fr||ja||zh}} is a {{ill|Jōyō kanji|ja|常用漢字}}, or a {{ill|Kanji|ja|漢字}} used in writing the {{ill|Japanese language|ja|日本語}}.<ref>{{cite web |title=Jōyō Kanji Hyō |script-title=ja:常用漢字表 |trans-title=List of Joyo Kanji |url=https://www.bunka.go.jp/kokugo_nihongo/sisaku/joho/joho/kijun/naikaku/pdf/joyokanjihyo_20101130.pdf |access-date=November 7, 2018 |publisher=Agency of Cultural Af...'
Removing [[:Category:Secondary School Kanji]] per [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2023 July 21#Category:Secondary School Kanji]]

revision.text:
{{draft}} {{Interlanguage link|{{PAGENAME}}|fr||ja||zh}} is a {{ill|Jōyō kanji|ja|常用漢字}}, or a {{ill|Kanji|ja|漢字}} used in writing the {{ill|Japanese language|ja|日本語}}.{{cite web |title=Jōyō Kanji Hyō |script-title=ja:常用漢字表 |trans-title=List of Joyo Kanji |url=https://www.bunka.go.jp/kokugo_nihongo/sisaku/joho/joho/kijun/naikaku/pdf/joyokanjihyo_20101130.pdf |access-date=November 7, 2018 |publisher=Agency of Cultural Affairs, Government of Japan |language=ja}} It is a secondary school kanji.{{Cite web |title=KANJI-Link |url=http://www.kanji-link.com/en/kanji/grade/ |access-date=2023-06-02 |website=www.kanji-link.com |language=en}} * [[Adachi Morinaga]] * [[Adachi Kagemori]] * {{ill|Adachi Yoshikage|ja|安達義景}} * {{ill|Adachi Yasumori|ja|安達泰盛}} * {{ill|Adachi Munekage|ja|安達宗景}} * {{ill|Adachi Tokiaki|ja|安達時顕}} * {{ill|Adachi Takakage|ja|安達高景}} {{Navbox|name=Tokyo|title=[[Tokyo|Tokyo Metropolis]]|group1=[[Special wards of Tokyo|Special Wards
of Tokyo]]|list1=*[[Adachi, Tokyo|Adachi]] *[[Arakawa, Tokyo|Arakawa]] *[[Bunkyō]] *[[Chiyoda, Tokyo|Chiyoda]] *[[Chūō, Tokyo|Chūō]] *[[Edogawa, Tokyo|Edogawa]] *[[Itabashi]] *[[Katsushika]] *[[Kita, Tokyo|Kita]] *[[Kōtō|Kōtō]] *[[Meguro]] *[[Minato, Tokyo|Minato]] *[[Nakano, Tokyo|Nakano]] *[[Nerima]] *[[Ōta, Tokyo|Ōta]] *[[Setagaya]] *[[Shibuya]] *[[Shinagawa]] *[[Shinjuku]] *[[Suginami]] *[[Sumida, Tokyo|Sumida]] *[[Taitō]] *[[Toshima]]|listclass=hlist|state={{{state|autocollapse}}}|above=*[[Architecture of Tokyo|Architecture]] *[[Education in Tokyo|Education]] *[[Festivals in Tokyo|Festivals]] *[[History of Tokyo|History]] *[[Template:Neighborhoods of Tokyo|Neighborhoods]] *[[Tokyo Metropolitan Government|Politics]] *[[Sports in Tokyo|Sports]] *[[Symbols of Tokyo|Symbols]] *[[Tourism in Tokyo|Tourism]] *[[Transport in Greater Tokyo|Transportation]]|below=*[[List of mergers in Tokyo|List of mergers in Tokyo Metropolis]] *[[Portal:Tokyo|Portal]] *[[:Category:Tokyo|Category]]|group2=[[Western Tokyo|Western
(Tama area)]]|list2={{Navbox|child | group1 = [[Core cities of Japan|Core city]] | list1 = *[[Hachiōji]] | group2 = [[Cities of Japan|Cities]] | list2 = *[[Akiruno, Tokyo|Akiruno]] *[[Akishima, Tokyo|Akishima]] *[[Chōfu]] *[[Fuchū, Tokyo|Fuchū]] *[[Fussa, Tokyo|Fussa]] *[[Hamura, Tokyo|Hamura]] *[[Higashikurume, Tokyo|Higashikurume]] *[[Higashimurayama|Higashimurayama]] *[[Higashiyamato, Tokyo|Higashiyamato]] *[[Hino, Tokyo|Hino]] *[[Inagi]] *[[Kiyose, Tokyo|Kiyose]] *[[Kodaira, Tokyo|Kodaira]] *[[Koganei, Tokyo|Koganei]] *[[Kokubunji, Tokyo|Kokubunji]] *[[Komae, Tokyo|Komae]] *[[Kunitachi, Tokyo|Kunitachi]] *[[Machida, Tokyo|Machida]] *[[Mitaka, Tokyo|Mitaka]] *[[Musashimurayama, Tokyo|Musashimurayama]] *[[Musashino, Tokyo|Musashino]] *[[Nishitokyo]] *[[Ōme, Tokyo|Ōme]] *[[Tachikawa, Tokyo|Tachikawa]] *[[Tama, Tokyo|Tama]] | group3 = [[Nishitama District, Tokyo|Nishitama District]] | list3 = *[[Hinode, Tokyo|Hinode]] *[[Mizuho, Tokyo|Mizuho]] *[[Okutama, Tokyo|Okutama]] *[[Hinohara]] }}|group3=[[Tokyo Islands|Insular Area]]|list3=*[[Ōshima Subprefecture (Tokyo)|Ōshima Subprefecture]] **[[Ōshima, Tokyo|Ōshima]] **[[To-shima, Tokyo|To-shima]] **[[Niijima, Tokyo|Niijima]] **[[Kōzushima, Tokyo|Kōzushima]] *[[Miyake Subprefecture]] **[[Miyake-jima|Miyake]] **[[Mikurajima, Tokyo|Mikurajima]] *[[Hachijō Subprefecture]] **[[Hachijō, Tokyo|Hachijō]] **[[Aogashima, Tokyo|Aogashima]] *[[Ogasawara Subprefecture]] **[[Ogasawara, Tokyo|Ogasawara]]|aboveclass=hlist|belowclass=hlist}}{{collapsible option}} [[fr:{{PAGENAME}}]][[zh:{{PAGENAME}}]][[ja:{{PAGENAME}}]] ==See Also== * {{ill|List of jōyō kanji|ja|常用漢字一覧}} ==References== {{reflist}} {{Draft categories| [[Category:Kanji]] }}

{{draft}} {{Interlanguage link|{{PAGENAME}}|fr||ja||zh}} is a {{ill|Jōyō kanji|ja|常用漢字}}, or a {{ill|Kanji|ja|漢字}} used in writing the {{ill|Japanese language|ja|日本語}}.{{cite web |title=Jōyō Kanji Hyō |script-title=ja:常用漢字表 |trans-title=List of Joyo Kanji |url=https://www.bunka.go.jp/kokugo_nihongo/sisaku/joho/joho/kijun/naikaku/pdf/joyokanjihyo_20101130.pdf |access-date=November 7, 2018 |publisher=Agency of Cultural Affairs, Government of Japan |language=ja}} It is a secondary school kanji.{{Cite web |title=KANJI-Link |url=http://www.kanji-link.com/en/kanji/grade/ |access-date=2023-06-02 |website=www.kanji-link.com |language=en}} * [[Adachi Morinaga]] * [[Adachi Kagemori]] * {{ill|Adachi Yoshikage|ja|安達義景}} * {{ill|Adachi Yasumori|ja|安達泰盛}} * {{ill|Adachi Munekage|ja|安達宗景}} * {{ill|Adachi Tokiaki|ja|安達時顕}} * {{ill|Adachi Takakage|ja|安達高景}} {{Navbox|name=Tokyo|title=[[Adachi clan]] heads|group1=[[Special wards of Tokyo|Special Wards
of Tokyo]]|list1=*[[Adachi, Tokyo|Adachi]] *[[Arakawa, Tokyo|Arakawa]] *[[Bunkyō]] *[[Chiyoda, Tokyo|Chiyoda]] *[[Chūō, Tokyo|Chūō]] *[[Edogawa, Tokyo|Edogawa]] *[[Itabashi]] *[[Katsushika]] *[[Kita, Tokyo|Kita]] *[[Kōtō|Kōtō]] *[[Meguro]] *[[Minato, Tokyo|Minato]] *[[Nakano, Tokyo|Nakano]] *[[Nerima]] *[[Ōta, Tokyo|Ōta]] *[[Setagaya]] *[[Shibuya]] *[[Shinagawa]] *[[Shinjuku]] *[[Suginami]] *[[Sumida, Tokyo|Sumida]] *[[Taitō]] *[[Toshima]]|listclass=hlist|state={{{state|autocollapse}}}|above=*[[Architecture of Tokyo|Architecture]] *[[Education in Tokyo|Education]] *[[Festivals in Tokyo|Festivals]] *[[History of Tokyo|History]] *[[Template:Neighborhoods of Tokyo|Neighborhoods]] *[[Tokyo Metropolitan Government|Politics]] *[[Sports in Tokyo|Sports]] *[[Symbols of Tokyo|Symbols]] *[[Tourism in Tokyo|Tourism]] *[[Transport in Greater Tokyo|Transportation]]|below=*[[List of mergers in Tokyo|List of mergers in Tokyo Metropolis]] *[[Portal:Tokyo|Portal]] *[[:Category:Tokyo|Category]]|group2=[[Western Tokyo|Western
(Tama area)]]|list2={{Navbox|child | group1 = [[Core cities of Japan|Core city]] | list1 = *[[Hachiōji]] | group2 = [[Cities of Japan|Cities]] | list2 = *[[Akiruno, Tokyo|Akiruno]] *[[Akishima, Tokyo|Akishima]] *[[Chōfu]] *[[Fuchū, Tokyo|Fuchū]] *[[Fussa, Tokyo|Fussa]] *[[Hamura, Tokyo|Hamura]] *[[Higashikurume, Tokyo|Higashikurume]] *[[Higashimurayama|Higashimurayama]] *[[Higashiyamato, Tokyo|Higashiyamato]] *[[Hino, Tokyo|Hino]] *[[Inagi]] *[[Kiyose, Tokyo|Kiyose]] *[[Kodaira, Tokyo|Kodaira]] *[[Koganei, Tokyo|Koganei]] *[[Kokubunji, Tokyo|Kokubunji]] *[[Komae, Tokyo|Komae]] *[[Kunitachi, Tokyo|Kunitachi]] *[[Machida, Tokyo|Machida]] *[[Mitaka, Tokyo|Mitaka]] *[[Musashimurayama, Tokyo|Musashimurayama]] *[[Musashino, Tokyo|Musashino]] *[[Nishitokyo]] *[[Ōme, Tokyo|Ōme]] *[[Tachikawa, Tokyo|Tachikawa]] *[[Tama, Tokyo|Tama]] | group3 = [[Nishitama District, Tokyo|Nishitama District]] | list3 = *[[Hinode, Tokyo|Hinode]] *[[Mizuho, Tokyo|Mizuho]] *[[Okutama, Tokyo|Okutama]] *[[Hinohara]] }}|group3=[[Tokyo Islands|Insular Area]]|list3=*[[Ōshima Subprefecture (Tokyo)|Ōshima Subprefecture]] **[[Ōshima, Tokyo|Ōshima]] **[[To-shima, Tokyo|To-shima]] **[[Niijima, Tokyo|Niijima]] **[[Kōzushima, Tokyo|Kōzushima]] *[[Miyake Subprefecture]] **[[Miyake-jima|Miyake]] **[[Mikurajima, Tokyo|Mikurajima]] *[[Hachijō Subprefecture]] **[[Hachijō, Tokyo|Hachijō]] **[[Aogashima, Tokyo|Aogashima]] *[[Ogasawara Subprefecture]] **[[Ogasawara, Tokyo|Ogasawara]]|aboveclass=hlist|belowclass=hlist}}{{collapsible option}} [[fr:{{PAGENAME}}]][[zh:{{PAGENAME}}]][[ja:{{PAGENAME}}]] ==See Also== * {{ill|List of jōyō kanji|ja|常用漢字一覧}} ==References== {{reflist}} {{Draft categories| [[Category:Kanji]] }}

{{draft}} {{Interlanguage link|{{PAGENAME}}|fr||ja||zh}} is a {{ill|Jōyō kanji|ja|常用漢字}}, or a {{ill|Kanji|ja|漢字}} used in writing the {{ill|Japanese language|ja|日本語}}.{{cite web |title=Jōyō Kanji Hyō |script-title=ja:常用漢字表 |trans-title=List of Joyo Kanji |url=https://www.bunka.go.jp/kokugo_nihongo/sisaku/joho/joho/kijun/naikaku/pdf/joyokanjihyo_20101130.pdf |access-date=November 7, 2018 |publisher=Agency of Cultural Affairs, Government of Japan |language=ja}} It is a secondary school kanji.{{Cite web |title=KANJI-Link |url=http://www.kanji-link.com/en/kanji/grade/ |access-date=2023-06-02 |website=www.kanji-link.com |language=en}} * [[Adachi Morinaga]] * [[Adachi Kagemori]] * {{ill|Adachi Yoshikage|ja|安達義景}} * {{ill|Adachi Yasumori|ja|安達泰盛}} * {{ill|Adachi Munekage|ja|安達宗景}} * {{ill|Adachi Tokiaki|ja|安達時顕}} * {{ill|Adachi Takakage|ja|安達高景}} {{Navbox | name = Tokyo | title = [[Tokyo|Tokyo Metropolis]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | aboveclass = hlist | listclass = hlist | belowclass = hlist | group1 = [[Special wards of Tokyo|Special Wards
of Tokyo]] | list1 = *[[Adachi, Tokyo|Adachi]] *[[Arakawa, Tokyo|Arakawa]] *[[Bunkyō]] *[[Chiyoda, Tokyo|Chiyoda]] *[[Chūō, Tokyo|Chūō]] *[[Edogawa, Tokyo|Edogawa]] *[[Itabashi]] *[[Katsushika]] *[[Kita, Tokyo|Kita]] *[[Kōtō|Kōtō]] *[[Meguro]] *[[Minato, Tokyo|Minato]] *[[Nakano, Tokyo|Nakano]] *[[Nerima]] *[[Ōta, Tokyo|Ōta]] *[[Setagaya]] *[[Shibuya]] *[[Shinagawa]] *[[Shinjuku]] *[[Suginami]] *[[Sumida, Tokyo|Sumida]] *[[Taitō]] *[[Toshima]] }} {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Tokyo templates| ]] [[fr:{{PAGENAME}}]][[zh:{{PAGENAME}}]][[ja:{{PAGENAME}}]] ==See Also== * {{ill|List of jōyō kanji|ja|常用漢字一覧}} ==References== {{reflist}} {{Draft categories| [[Category:Kanji]] }}

{{draft}} * [[Adachi Morinaga]] * [[Adachi Kagemori]] * {{ill|Adachi Yoshikage|ja|安達義景}} * {{ill|Adachi Yasumori|ja|安達泰盛}} * {{ill|Adachi Munekage|ja|安達宗景}} * {{ill|Adachi Tokiaki|ja|安達時顕}} * {{ill|Adachi Takakage|ja|安達高景}} {{Navbox | name = Tokyo | title = [[Tokyo|Tokyo Metropolis]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | aboveclass = hlist | listclass = hlist | belowclass = hlist | group1 = [[Special wards of Tokyo|Special Wards
of Tokyo]] | list1 = *[[Adachi, Tokyo|Adachi]] *[[Arakawa, Tokyo|Arakawa]] *[[Bunkyō]] *[[Chiyoda, Tokyo|Chiyoda]] *[[Chūō, Tokyo|Chūō]] *[[Edogawa, Tokyo|Edogawa]] *[[Itabashi]] *[[Katsushika]] *[[Kita, Tokyo|Kita]] *[[Kōtō|Kōtō]] *[[Meguro]] *[[Minato, Tokyo|Minato]] *[[Nakano, Tokyo|Nakano]] *[[Nerima]] *[[Ōta, Tokyo|Ōta]] *[[Setagaya]] *[[Shibuya]] *[[Shinagawa]] *[[Shinjuku]] *[[Suginami]] *[[Sumida, Tokyo|Sumida]] *[[Taitō]] *[[Toshima]] }} {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Tokyo templates| ]] [[fr:{{PAGENAME}}]][[zh:{{PAGENAME}}]][[ja:{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[Draft:繰]] to [[Template:Adachi clan heads]]

revision.text:
<noinclude>{{histsplit|Draft:繰|reason=[[Special:Diff/1185020659]] and earlier were about the kanji}}</noinclude>{{Navbox
| name       = Adachi clan heads
| title      = [[Adachi clan]] heads
| state      = {{{state|autocollapse}}}
| aboveclass = hlist
| listclass  = hlist
| belowclass = hlist

| group1 = heads
| list1  = 
* [[Adachi Morinaga|Morinaga]]
* [[Adachi Kagemori|Kagemori]]
* {{ill|Adachi Yoshikage|ja|安達義景|lt=Yoshikage}}
* {{ill|Adachi Yasumori|ja|安達泰盛|lt=Yasumori}}
* {{ill|Adachi Munekage|ja|安達宗景|lt=Munekage}}
* {{ill|Adachi Tokiaki|ja|安達時顕|lt=Tokiaki}}
* {{ill|Adachi Takakage|ja|安達高景|lt=Takakage}}
}}<noinclude>
{{navbox documentation}}
[[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Decline history split, no clearly-delineated split point in history (versions both before and after the linked diff cover bits of both topics)
Requesting history split again since I linked the wrong revision last time
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{histsplit|Draft:繰|reason=[[Special:Diff/1169404846]] and earlier were about the kanji}}</noinclude>{{Navbox
| name       = Adachi clan heads
| title      = [[Adachi clan]] heads
| state      = {{{state|autocollapse}}}
| aboveclass = hlist
| listclass  = hlist
| belowclass = hlist

| group1 = heads
| list1  = 
* [[Adachi Morinaga|Morinaga]]
* [[Adachi Kagemori|Kagemori]]
* {{ill|Adachi Yoshikage|ja|安達義景|lt=Yoshikage}}
* {{ill|Adachi Yasumori|ja|安達泰盛|lt=Yasumori}}
* {{ill|Adachi Munekage|ja|安達宗景|lt=Munekage}}
* {{ill|Adachi Tokiaki|ja|安達時顕|lt=Tokiaki}}
* {{ill|Adachi Takakage|ja|安達高景|lt=Takakage}}
}}<noinclude>
{{navbox documentation}}
[[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects A]]

revision.comment: Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "|qq=|" to "|"
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23124421395|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: tag page without wikidata link [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24744680692|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24755395338|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Adachi clan heads | title = [[:en:Adachi clan|Adachi clan]] heads | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | aboveclass = hlist | listclass = hlist | belowclass = hlist
| group1 = heads | list1 = * [[:en:Adachi Morinaga|Morinaga]] * [[:en:Adachi Kagemori|Kagemori]] * {{ill|Adachi Yoshikage|ja|安達義景|lt=Yoshikage|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Yoshikage|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Yoshikage|qq=}} * {{ill|Adachi Yasumori|ja|安達泰盛|lt=Yasumori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Yasumori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Yasumori|qq=}} * {{ill|Adachi Munekage|ja|安達宗景|lt=Munekage|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Munekage|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Munekage|qq=}} * {{ill|Adachi Tokiaki|ja|安達時顕|lt=Tokiaki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Tokiaki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Tokiaki|qq=}} * {{ill|Adachi Takakage|ja|安達高景|lt=Takakage|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Takakage|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Takakage|qq=}} }}<noinclude> {{navbox documentation}} [[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Pages without wikidata]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Adachi_clan_heads here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Adachi_clan_heads for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Navbox | name = Adachi clan heads | title = [[:en:Adachi clan|Adachi clan]] heads | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | aboveclass = hlist | listclass = hlist | belowclass = hlist
| group1 = heads | list1 = * [[:en:Adachi Morinaga|Morinaga]] * [[:en:Adachi Kagemori|Kagemori]] * {{ill|Adachi Yoshikage|ja|安達義景|lt=Yoshikage|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Yoshikage|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Yoshikage|qq=}} * {{ill|Adachi Yasumori|ja|安達泰盛|lt=Yasumori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Yasumori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Yasumori|qq=}} * {{ill|Adachi Munekage|ja|安達宗景|lt=Munekage|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Munekage|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Munekage|qq=}} * {{ill|Adachi Tokiaki|ja|安達時顕|lt=Tokiaki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Tokiaki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Tokiaki|qq=}} * {{ill|Adachi Takakage|ja|安達高景|lt=Takakage|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Takakage|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Takakage|qq=}} }}<noinclude> {{navbox documentation}} [[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Adachi_clan_heads here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Adachi_clan_heads for full history. | group1 = heads | list1 = * [[:en:Adachi Morinaga|Morinaga]] * [[:en:Adachi Kagemori|Kagemori]] * {{ill|Adachi Yoshikage|ja|安達義景|lt=Yoshikage|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Yoshikage|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Yoshikage|qq=}} * {{ill|Adachi Yasumori|ja|安達泰盛|lt=Yasumori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Yasumori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Yasumori|qq=}} * {{ill|Adachi Munekage|ja|安達宗景|lt=Munekage|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Munekage|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Munekage|qq=}} * {{ill|Adachi Tokiaki|ja|安達時顕|lt=Tokiaki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Tokiaki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Tokiaki|qq=}} * {{ill|Adachi Takakage|ja|安達高景|lt=Takakage|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Takakage|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Adachi Takakage|qq=}} }}<noinclude> {{navbox documentation}} [[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]]
